---
title: " "
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    css: custom.css
    slide-number: true
    controls: false
    menu: false
---

## { data-state="cover-slide" data-background-image="images/cover.png" data-background-size="cover" visibility="uncounted"}

## Motivation {.background-slide}

<div style="position:absolute; top:12%; left:0%;" class="fragment fade-out">
  - [Evaluate dynamic predictions]{style="color:#FF69B4;"} of imminent delivery in pregnancies complicated by early-onset fetal growth restriction (FGR)
  - [Main goal]{style="color:#FF1493;"}: optimizing antenatal corticosteroid (CCS) administration
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:60%; left:12%;">
  <img src="images/time_line_mujer_feto.svg" style="width:90%; text-align:center;">
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:12%; left:0%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  - Methods are applied to data from the [OPTICORE]{style="color:#00BFFF;"} multicenter cohort study 
</div>


## Asymmetric misclassification {.background-slide}

<div style="position:absolute; top:9%; left:18%;">
  <img src="images/decision_tree.svg" style="width:80%; text-align:center;">
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:20%; left:78%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  [TP]{style="color:#3ECF72;"}
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:43%; left:78%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  [FP]{style="color:#FE8330;"}
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:66%; left:78%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  [TN]{style="color:#3ECF72;"}
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:90%; left:78%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  [FN]{style="color:#FF4040;"}
</div>


## Challenges of the data {.background-slide}

-   CCS cannot be administered until the fetus reaches [$500$ grams]{style="color:#00BFFF;"} and a gestational age of [$168$ days]{style="color:#00BFFF;"} ($24$ weeks)

<div style="position:absolute; top:37%; left:12%;">
  <img src="images/LT2.svg" style="width:90%; text-align:center;">
</div>


## Definitions and notation {.background-slide}

<div style="position:absolute; top:12%; left:0%;" class="fragment fade-out">
-   $\require{color}\textcolor{#00BFFF}{T_1^*,\dots, T_n^*}$ true time until event
-   $\require{color}\textcolor{#00BFFF}{C_1,\dots, C_n}$ right-censoring times
-   $\require{color}\textcolor{#00BFFF}{L_1,\dots, L_n}$ left-truncation times
-   $\require{color}\textcolor{#00BFFF}{T_i=\min(T_i^*, C_i)}$ observed times, $i=1,\dotsc,n$
-   $\require{color}\textcolor{#00BFFF}{\delta_i=\mathbf{1}\{T_i^*\leq C_i\}}$ censoring indicator, $i=1,\dotsc,n$
-   $\require{color}\textcolor{#00BFFF}{\boldsymbol{\mathcal{H}}_i(t)}$ available history at time $t$, including baseline and time-dependent covarites
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:12%; left:0%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  - [Dynamic predictions]{style="color:#00BFFF;"}
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:22%; left:9%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  $$
  \normalsize\require{color}
  \pi_{i}(7 \mid t)=\operatorname{Pr}\left(T_{i}^* \leq t+7 \mid T_{i}^*>t, \colorbox{#2E8B57}{$\color{white}\boldsymbol{\mathcal{H}}_i(t)$}\right)
  $$
</div>

<div style="position:absolute; top:45%; left:12%;" class="fragment fade-in">
  <img src="images/dynamic_pred.svg" style="width:90%; text-align:center;">
</div>
